blocked_actions: route implementation before source resolution
completion_detection: source_refs is non-empty
outcome_contract exists
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory has the input and is determining what it means.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Normalize the input without treating user prose as approved scope.

blocked_actions: ask user to reconcile internal source bookkeeping
completion_detection: critical claims point to source refs
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is separating facts, assumptions and gaps.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Keep raw extraction private; publish only public-safe refs.

blocked_actions: turn unresolved gaps into execution scope
completion_detection: open gaps are resolved, blocked or owner-assigned
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is deciding what can be known safely.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Only authority/access/risk questions should reach the user.

blocked_actions: treat outcome candidate as approved Product SOT
completion_detection: outcome, user, problem and success signals exist
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is turning the material into a product outcome.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Outcome is still candidate until Product SOT approval or bounded acceptance.

entry_conditions: outcome and discovery are resolved enough
blocked_actions: execute from paper instead of Product SOT
completion_detection: product_sot exists and scope is explicit
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory has a candidate source of truth for the product.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: SOT can evolve beyond the input paper; paper is source, not final authority.

blocked_actions: ask user to choose internal method machinery
completion_detection: selected method, gates, workers and evidence are recorded
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is choosing the safest production path.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: The router records decisions; it does not hand method selection to the user.

allowed_next_actions: record required plans, gates and workers
blocked_actions: start implementation with undocumented process choices
completion_detection: required artifacts and workers are named
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory has recorded how the work will be produced.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Any omitted method needs a reason, not silence.

blocked_actions: activate a pack without proof or coverage
completion_detection: required surfaces are covered or blocked
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is choosing the capability packs needed for the product.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Pack templates are not execution approval.

entry_conditions: risk tier and surfaces are known
blocked_actions: infer approval from silence
completion_detection: required authority is granted, blocked or not needed
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory will ask only for bounded authority, access or risk decisions.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Human approval must name scope and evidence.

entry_conditions: material security or privacy risk exists
blocked_actions: build material risk before architecture
completion_detection: controls, threats and reviewers are named
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is planning security before build work.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Security review is not a substitute for architecture.

entry_conditions: method and required gates are known
allowed_next_actions: create work units and verification plan
blocked_actions: execute before plans and stop criteria exist
completion_detection: work units, checks, review and rollback are named
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is creating the execution plan.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: The user should see plan status, not internal planning machinery.

allowed_next_actions: confirm tools, environment, limits and rollback
blocked_actions: start autonomous work with missing access or limits
completion_detection: tools, accounts, environment and rollback are ready or blocked
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is checking whether it can act safely.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Missing access becomes a bounded request, not vague user labor.

entry_conditions: required plans and autonomy readiness exist
allowed_next_actions: create required worker tasks when gate passes
blocked_actions: dispatch blocked workers
completion_detection: gate_predicate_result is PASS
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory can say whether execution may start.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Gate report must separate factory work from user decisions.

allowed_next_actions: show compressed state and next action
blocked_actions: treat projection as source of truth
completion_detection: projection states source-of-truth boundary
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory shows status without making the user operate internals.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Projection mirrors canonical state and may be stale.

blocked_actions: spawn without route readiness
completion_detection: required worker tasks exist in runtime
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is executing through routed workers.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: The user does not manage the worker queue.

blocked_actions: treat packet existence as proof
completion_detection: required workers returned valid records
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is collecting what workers actually proved.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Generated requests are not execution evidence.

allowed_next_actions: run named checks and record outputs
blocked_actions: claim done without command evidence
completion_detection: verification commands and results are attached
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is proving the work with checks.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Verification is scoped to the card and cannot be implied.

blocked_actions: allow executor to self-approve
completion_detection: reviewer is different from executor and result is attached
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is checking the work with an independent reviewer.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Review may find blockers; it is not ceremony.

entry_conditions: authority, risk or release requires human decision
blocked_actions: invent, infer or simulate approval
completion_detection: real human decision with scope and evidence exists
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory needs a bounded human decision.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: The user decides authority; the factory prepares the packet.

entry_conditions: workers, checks and review are complete or blocked
allowed_next_actions: summarize delivered work and remaining risk
blocked_actions: hide unresolved blockers in prose
completion_detection: closure result and next step are explicit
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is packaging what happened.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Handoff is replayable state, not a chat summary.

blocked_actions: mark done without Receipt Five
completion_detection: changed, artifacts, commands, review and next action exist
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is preparing the done receipt.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Receipt Five is the durable proof boundary.

allowed_next_actions: compare required work with delivered work
blocked_actions: close skipped method or evidence requirements
completion_detection: audit result is PASS, BLOCKED or PENDING with reasons
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is checking whether the promised work was actually delivered.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Audit must not inflate contract-level proof into runtime proof.

blocked_actions: release without owner, rollback or approval
completion_detection: owner, rollback, health checks and approval rule exist
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is preparing production operation or blocking release.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Production readiness is stronger than passing tests.

allowed_next_actions: release with authority or block with next action
blocked_actions: promote without production-strict evidence
completion_detection: release or block has owner, evidence and next action
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is ready to release or can explain why not.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Blocked is a valid result when evidence is insufficient.

entry_conditions: release or production block is decided
blocked_actions: ship without support owner when support is material
completion_detection: incident triggers, triage and escalation exist
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory has a support and incident path.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Support is part of production, not afterthought docs.

blocked_actions: auto-activate critical factory changes
completion_detection: proposal is accepted, rejected or gated
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is learning from the run without changing critical rules silently.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Critical factory changes require explicit human approval.

entry_conditions: learnback exists or repeated blind spot is detected
blocked_actions: commit raw study or private evidence
completion_detection: blind spots and actions are recorded
phases.operator_visible_summary: Factory is auditing its own process gaps.
phases.maintainer_visible_details: Public repo gets proposals and contracts, not raw evidence.
